# fptcloud_security_group (Resource)

Provides a Fpt cloud security group which can be attached to an instance in order to firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fptcloud_security_group" "example" {
  vpc_id    = "your_vpc_id"
  name      = "example"
  subnet_id = "your_subnet_id"
  type      = "ACL"
  apply_to = ["ip_or_cidr"]
}
```

## Import

Import format: `vpc_id/security_group_id`. Use `fptcloud_vpc` for `vpc_id` and `fptcloud_security_group` (by name or id) for the security group `id`, then use a separate resource and an `import` block.

**Example: import an existing security group by name**

Look up the security group by name with the data source, then import into a dedicated resource:

```terraform
# VPC (e.g. from existing data or variable)
data "fptcloud_vpc" "main" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

# Look up security group by name to get id for import
data "fptcloud_security_group" "existing" {
  vpc_id = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  name   = "my-security-group"
}

import {
  to = fptcloud_security_group.imported
  id = "${data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id}/${data.fptcloud_security_group.existing.id}"
}

resource "fptcloud_security_group" "imported" {
  vpc_id   = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  name     = data.fptcloud_security_group.existing.name
  type     = data.fptcloud_security_group.existing.type
  apply_to = data.fptcloud_security_group.existing.apply_to
}
```

Run `terraform plan` to perform the import. After a successful import, you can remove the `import` block. To use the CLI instead: `terraform import fptcloud_security_group.imported "<vpc_id>/<security_group_id>"`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the security group
- `type` (String) Type of the security group, can be `ACL` (Control traffic through in and through out the internet) or `DFW` (Control traffic through in and through out the local network)
- `vpc_id` (String) The vpc id of the security group

### Optional

- `apply_to` (List of String) The list IP apply to of the security group
- `subnet_id` (String) The subnet id of the security group (required when creating)
- `tag_ids` (Set of String) List of tag IDs to associate with the security group

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The created at of the security group
- `edge_gateway_id` (String) The edge gateway id of the security group
- `id` (String) The id of the security group
